# landlaw.ai

Instant guidance on planning permission, permitted development, boundary disputes, and land law — reviewed by UK solicitors.

Part of the MEOK AI Labs sovereign hive: https://meok.ai

## Pages
- Home: https://landlaw.ai/
- Pricing: https://landlaw.ai/pricing
- Signup: https://landlaw.ai/signup
- Partner: https://landlaw.ai/partner
